description: Lock electrocardiography_early to Einthoven-style electrical physiological recording and clinical heart-disease diagnosis rather than radiology-department imaging workflows.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to Einthoven's 1903 electrocardiograph work.
Clinical medicine supplies the patient-diagnosis and disease-interpretation context for electrocardiograms.
Clinical diagnosis is the corrected medical-practice prerequisite for early ECG.
The fixed instrument, physiological laboratory, and hospital diagnostic context remains direct.
Radiology departments are imaging infrastructure and must not be used to source early electrical cardiac recording.
